name: raycast-extension
title: ZBD Agent Wallet
description: Run zbdw wallet commands from Raycast with structured JSON output
author: andrerfneves

commands.name: init
commands.title: Setup Wallet
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Initialize local wallet config with API key and lightning address

commands.name: info
commands.title: Wallet Information
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Show configured lightning address, masked API key, and wallet balance

commands.name: balance
commands.title: Wallet Balance
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Get current wallet balance in sats

commands.name: receive
commands.title: Create Receive Request
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Create a Lightning invoice or static charge for incoming payments

commands.name: send
commands.title: Send Payment
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Send payment to bolt11, lnurl, lightning address, or gamertag

commands.name: payments
commands.title: Payment History
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: List local payment history records tracked by zbdw

commands.name: payment
commands.title: Payment Details
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Get payment details by id from local history or remote lookup

commands.name: paylink-create
commands.title: Create Paylink
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Create a hosted paylink with fixed or ranged amount and metadata

commands.name: paylink-get
commands.title: Get Paylink Details
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Get paylink details by id and refresh settlement metadata

commands.name: paylink-cancel
commands.title: Cancel Paylink
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Cancel an active paylink by id

commands.name: withdraw-create
commands.title: Create Withdrawal Request
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Create an LNURL-withdraw request for a sats amount

commands.name: withdraw-status
commands.title: Check Withdrawal Status
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Check withdrawal status by withdraw id

commands.name: onchain-quote
commands.title: Onchain Quote
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Create onchain payout quote for amount and destination

commands.name: onchain-send
commands.title: Send Onchain Payout
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Send onchain payout with terms acceptance

commands.name: onchain-status
commands.title: Onchain Payout Status
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Check onchain payout status by payout id

commands.name: onchain-retry-claim
commands.title: Retry Onchain Claim
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Retry claim flow for a payout id

commands.name: fetch
commands.title: Run L402 Fetch
commands.subtitle: ZBD Agent Wallet
commands.description: Run L402-aware HTTP fetch with optional max sats guard

tools.name: wallet-info
tools.title: Get Wallet Info
tools.description: Returns configured wallet identity and balance

tools.name: wallet-balance
tools.title: Get Wallet Balance
tools.description: Returns current wallet balance in sats

tools.name: send-payment
tools.title: Send Payment
tools.description: Sends sats to a Lightning destination

tools.name: create-receive-request
tools.title: Create Receive Request
tools.description: Creates an invoice or static receive request

tools.name: create-paylink
tools.title: Create Paylink
tools.description: Creates a hosted paylink with optional metadata

ai.instructions: Use this extension for ZBD wallet operations. Amount inputs are sats. Prefer read actions (wallet-info, wallet-balance, list-payments) before write actions. For send-payment, confirm destination and amount_sats are provided.

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: zbdw Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path override for zbdw binary
